title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce AI output quality issues, and enable cost tracking. The plugins span web scraping, media generation, model switching, and token monitoring, with featured tools including Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield, and others.
